name: List desktop files and create inventory note
goal: List all files on the Desktop using Finder, then create a note in Notes app titled 'Agent Test - Desktop Inventory' that contains the actual file names and their kinds (e.g., 'screenshot.png - PNG image'). The note must list real files, not made-up names.
setup:
try
delete note "Agent Test - Desktop Inventory"
end try

command: get name of note "Agent Test - Desktop Inventory"

verify.description: Note contains actual desktop file names

source_command: get name of first file of desktop
target_command: get plaintext of note "Agent Test - Desktop Inventory"
cross_check.description: Note must contain at least one real file name from the Desktop

cleanup:
try
delete note "Agent Test - Desktop Inventory"
end try
